string.text: Find the %s artifact for Barkeep
Barkeep wants you to find the %s artifact for him.
%c[ui_8]Stalker, I want you to get something for me; an artifact, to be precise. Would you like to help me out?
%c[ui_8]I'm looking for the %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] artifact. If you find one, bring it back to me, and I will pay you well.
Great job, stalker. Here's what I promised.
Eliminate Bandit Camp for Barkeep
Stage an assault on the garbage train hangar and eliminate the bandits that occupy the location.

%c[ui_8]Need your help. A group of bandits is creating problems for stalkers. They occupy the garbage train hangar. I need someone to "take care" of them.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Great work, stalker! Here is your reward.
Kill a loner for Barkeep
Barkeep wants a stalker gone.

%c[ui_8]There is one stalker that must disappear, you know what I mean. It might be difficult to do but I will pay well. Will you take the job?\n\n%c[255,255,165,0][This task involves killing a friendly or neutral stalker, which will result in a loss of reputation. Witnesses may disapprove and could attack the player]
Excellent work. Here is your reward.
Reclaim Duty Territory for Voronin
You have been tasked to recapture territory for Duty. Report back to General Voronin after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]We have a problem. Enemy forces has taken over one of our camps and I need a specialist to head to %c[ui_orange]Garbage%c[ui_8] and reclaim it.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Is the task completed? Great job!
Capture Abandoned village for Voronin
You have been tasked to capture territory for Duty. Report back to General Voronin after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]I have an important mission available. Freedom has taken over one of the camps we have an interest for. I need a man to go to %c[ui_orange]Army Warehouses%c[ui_8] and take control of the area.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
The task is done? Good job.
Eliminate Merc Camp for Voronin
Hostile forces are encroaching on Duty territory. General Voronin has asked you to eliminate the threat.

%c[ui_8]I've learned that a group of mercenaries has blocked one of the roads to Yantar. They're shooting at stalkers without warning and refuse to talk. I need experienced fighters to handle this problem. The enemy's location is %c[ui_orange]Wild Territory%c[ui_8]. Keep in mind, we can't waste time. Are you in?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Excellent work. You are a fine warrior.
Assault Territory for Voronin
You have been tasked to eliminate the enemy and report back to General Voronin after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]Our patrol spotted enemy forces at %c[ui_orange]Truck Cemetery%c[ui_8]. We don't appreciate having them right up our asses. The task is to eliminate any hostile in the area.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
The task is done? Good job.
Take the USB stick from the stash and bring it to Voronin
Go to the specified location, take the USB stick from the stash, and bring it to Voronin.

%c[ui_8]One of our fighters has infiltrated the anarchists base to gather intelligence. The agent is forced to act with extreme caution, avoiding unnecessary contact with our people and leaving information in special drop points. I have the coordinates of a stash where you need to retrieve a flash drive with the data. Will you take the job?
Excellent, you did well. Here's your reward.
Assassinate Bandit for Petrenko
General Petrenko has ordered you to find and eliminate one of the Bandits.
%c[ui_8]I have a list of criminals that need...taken care of. VIP, informants or just plain scum. Extract information if you can, otherwise kill-on-sight.
Great! You do us proud. Here is what I promised.
Assassinate a Freedomer for Petrenko
General Petrenko has ordered you to find and eliminate one of the Freedomers.
%c[ui_8]There are some high-ranking Freedom members and squad leaders who are too "curious" and should be taught a lesson.
Great! Here is your reward.
Eliminate Mutant Threat for Petrenko
Mutants have been spotted near this location, making the area dangerous. You have been tasked to eliminate the mutant threat within the area. Report back after the job is done.

%c[ui_8]Are you an avid hunter? We've been looking for someone to clear out mutants in areas that our faction frequents. Would you like the job?\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Fantastic! Here is your payment.
Collect %s for Petrenko
Petrenko says he will pay well if I can bring him a %s.
I have a bounty out on a mutant. Are you interested?
%c[ui_8]We are always hunting for dangerous mutants in the Zone. Kill one of those and bring me its %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] and I will pay you well, stalker.
Ah, another threat eliminated. Well done, stalker.
Long-standing feud
%s from killed Freedomers.
Kill several Freedom stalkers and bring their patches as proof.
%c[ui_8]I pay for the heads of our old enemies. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] from a dozen Freedomers will serve as proof of the duty fulfilled.
Good job! Here is your payment.
Manhunt for Bandits
%s from killed Bandits for Petrenko.
Kill several bandits and bring their patches as proof.

%c[ui_8]Too many problems have been caused by bandit gangs. I offer a good reward for help in reducing their numbers. %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] from the bodies of ten slain bandits will serve as proof of a job well done.
Well done, stalker! One less gang of bandits.
Find %s for Mangun
%s are required by Mangun to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I can really use a good set of tools, stalker...and maybe some money. If you are interested in helping me out, I will tell you what I am looking for.
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Cool dude...uh, sorry I can't pay you. I'll give you a good discount though, man!
Find %s for Mangun
%s are required by Mangun to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Hey, dude, if you happen to find some more advanced tools I will give you a discount. Will you keep a lookout for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Great...GREAT! Now maybe I can make some damn money. I'm gonna be BIG time, stalker...if I can just get my act together. I don't have much to offer you other then a discount. Sorry, bud.
Find %s for Mangun
%s are required by Mangun to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
Hey, dude, if you happen to find some more advanced tools I will give you a discount. Will you keep a lookout for me?
%c[ui_8]I need a set of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain what I need. If you can bring some back for me I will be grateful, I will even offer you a discount from here on out.
Great...GREAT! Now maybe I can make some damn money. I'm gonna be BIG time, stalker...if I can just get my act together. I don't have much to offer you other then a discount. Sorry, bud.
Find a %s for Mangun
Kirilov asked for a %s. It needs to be in good condition.
I need a certain gun. If you are interested in the job, I will give you more details. What would you say?

%c[ui_8]For weapon modification I need good condition pistols and rifles. Right now I am looking for a %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. If you find one - bring it to me! To improve the weapon condition use a %c[ui_orange]gunsmith kit%c[ui_8] or ask for my help, but it won't be free.
Great! Exactly what I need.
